summary: Backend smoke test for Boys Love streaming app. All 32 backend assertions passed across auth, series CRUD, episodes (with total_episodes recount + cascade delete), favorites, progress/continue-watching enrichment, reviews (with avg_rating recompute + rating validation), upload+files, and admin role enforcement.
passed: POST /api/series: 401 unauth, 403 non-admin, 200 admin with total_episodes=0/avg_rating=0
PUT/DELETE /api/episodes/{id} admin; total_episodes decrement on delete
POST /api/progress upsert; GET /api/progress/continue enriched with series+episode
POST /api/reviews valid; rating 6 -> 400; series.avg_rating recomputed to 5.0; GET /api/reviews?series_id=
POST /api/upload: 403 non-admin, 200 admin returns {path}; GET /api/files/{path} returns bytes (object storage integration works)
GET /api/auth/me 401 without auth, 200 with Bearer; ADMIN_EMAIL tqyisussss@gmail.com auto is_admin=true
notes: Sessions provisioned directly in MongoDB per /app/memory/test_credentials.md. Object storage (EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) verified end-to-end via upload + download. No blockers found.
